allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: rewrite Twelve Data rate limiter to prevent 429 errors

Replaced broken rate limiter with strict sliding-window approach:
- Single global callLog[] shared by all TD calls \(equities + metals\)
- Loop-based window check: wait until oldest call expires before proceeding
- 429 handler: clear log, wait 60s, retry once, then give up gracefully
- Log every API call with window count for observability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: prevent rate limiter infinite hang with timeouts

- Add 30s max wait to acquireSlot \(proceeds anyway on timeout\)
- Add 10s AbortController timeout to all Twelve Data fetch calls
- Wrap equities/metals route handlers with 20s Promise.race timeout
- Add debug logging to trace where requests get stuck

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: single-symbol quotes to stay under 8 credits/min

Twelve Data counts each symbol as 1 credit. Bulk quote for 14
symbols = 14 credits, which exceeds the 8/min free tier limit.

New strategy:
- Fetch quotes ONE symbol at a time \(1 credit each\)
- 7 quotes per 60s window, 14 symbols loads in ~2 minutes
- Each quote cached 60s per symbol
- Routes return cached data instantly \(never block\)
- Background fetcher populates cache for uncached symbols
- Frontend polls every 30s to pick up new data progressively
- 30s rate limiter timeout safety net still in place

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(tar czf - src/app/api/macro/route.ts src/app/api/scan/route.ts src/app/api/correlations/route.ts src/components/MacroBar.tsx src/components/TabNav.tsx src/components/SignalCard.tsx src/components/SignalsTab.tsx src/components/CorrelationMatrix.tsx src/config/sectors.ts src/lib/scanner.ts src/lib/correlation.ts src/app/globals.css src/app/page.tsx src/components/Heatmap.tsx src/components/ShortcutsModal.tsx)
